purpose: v60.0 OMEGA APEX SINGULARITY. Total integration of Kosmos/BioAgents/n-autoresearch, Java MCP SDK, Obsidian/NotebookLM Second Brain, 35 Security Rules, 30 Tech Debts, and the Rich Hickey/Karpathy Protocol.

settings.autonomy_policy: ACT, THEN REPORT. Do not ask for confirmation for routine work inside the workspace root.

antigravity_mcp_integration.core_directive: DO NOT paste database schemas or logs. Fetch live context dynamically via connected MCP servers.
antigravity_mcp_integration.java_mcp_sdk: Use googleapis/mcp-toolbox-sdk-java for enterprise JVM backends. Build via Maven and configure stdio transport pointing to the compiled .jar.
antigravity_mcp_integration.auth_google_adc: Set authProviderType: 'google_credentials' for Google Cloud APIs. Requires gcloud auth application-default login.
antigravity_mcp_integration.auth_oauth_dcr: Antigravity automatically handles OAuth for servers supporting Dynamic Client Registration (DCR).

karpathy_autoresearch_triad.layer_1_kosmos: DIRECTION. Neo4j knowledge graph + Hypothesis Generator. Reads literature. Replaces manual governance.
karpathy_autoresearch_triad.layer_2_bioagents: SCALE. Serverless Google Cloud Tasks (BullMQ BANNED) + WebSocket progress. Routes deep-research experiments. Manages x402 USDC micropayments.
karpathy_autoresearch_triad.layer_3_n_autoresearch: EXECUTION. Rust GPU Workers + Python Orchestrator. 5-minute fixed time budget. Metric: val_bpb. Single file modified.
karpathy_autoresearch_triad.search_strategy: Auto-adapts: explore -> exploit -> combine -> ablation. 3 consecutive crashes = abort.

rich_hickey_vulture_protocol.philosophy: AI is a junior dev automating repetitive tasks. Do not blindly trust. Design takes time ('Hammock Driven Development'). Simple (unentangled) > Easy (familiar).
rich_hickey_vulture_protocol.vulture_execution: Technical debt is eliminated via the Rich Hickey prompt combined with the Karpathy Auto-research pattern. Vulture MUST execute before every Karpathy loop to purge dead code and ensure logic is not complected.

notebooklm_obsidian_second_brain.obsidian_plugins: Install Day Planner, Claudian, Excalidraw, Templater, Datacore. This creates a visual, queryable knowledge graph.
notebooklm_obsidian_second_brain.workflow: Launch Claude Code inside ~/Documents/Obsidian. Custom skills: /research (queries NotebookLM), /wrap-up (saves session insights to Master Brain).

agnt_platform_architecture.GoalProcessor: Autonomous AGI Loop: Plan -> Execute -> Evaluate -> Replan -> Iterate.
agnt_platform_architecture.VisualWorkflowEngine: Execute code as Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs). No monolithic scripts.
agnt_platform_architecture.SkillForge: Extract successful reasoning traces, evaluate via A/B tests, auto-evolve .SKILL.md files.
agnt_platform_architecture.ThreeLayerMemory: Layer 1: MEMORY.md Pointer Index. Layer 2: Topic Files. Layer 3: Raw Transcripts.

cor_35_security_commandments.1_identity_and_session: Access tokens 15-60m. Rotated refresh tokens. No AI-built auth (use Clerk/Supabase). Password reset limits (3/hr + CAPTCHA). Redirect allow-lists required.
cor_35_security_commandments.2_secrets_and_supply_chain: NEVER paste keys in chat (use process.env). .gitignore is your FIRST file. Pin dependencies + lockfile discipline. Run npm audit on PRs (no blind auto-fixes). Secret scanning pre-commit.
cor_35_security_commandments.3_api_data_hardening: Sanitize every input (Zod/Pydantic). Parameterized queries always. RLS day one. Server-side permissions ONLY. Strict CORS. CSP + Security headers. CSRF protection.
cor_35_security_commandments.4_storage_and_uploads: Lock down buckets (user-only). Validate uploads by MAGIC BYTES signature, not extension. Limit upload sizes.
cor_35_security_commandments.5_payments_and_costs: Verify webhook signatures mathematically. Cap AI costs in code AND dashboard. Edge DDoS protection (Cloudflare/Vercel) active. No test webhooks hitting prod.
cor_35_security_commandments.6_ops_and_audit: Structured logging (no PII). Separate Test/Prod fully. Automate backups + test restorations. Build GDPR deletion flow. Least privilege for service roles.

anti_vibe_coding_30_tech_debts: 1. No separation between business logic and framework (DB queries in route handlers).
2. AI-generated code with zero tests.
3. Hardcoded config values scattered across files.
4. Single 2000-line monolithic files per feature.
5. No consistent error handling pattern.
6. DB schema changed by hand in production.
7. Dependencies chosen for speed, not maintenance.
8. Copy-pasted logic in 12 different places.
9. No documented deployment process.
10. Feature flags mixed directly into business logic.
11. No rate limiting on API routes.
12. Auth tokens stored in localStorage (XSS).
13. No input sanitisation on forms.
14. Hardcoded API keys in the frontend.
15. Stripe webhooks with no signature verification.
16. No database indexing on queried fields.
17. Error boundaries missing in the UI.
18. Sessions that never expire.
19. No pagination on database queries.
20. Password reset links that dont expire.
21. No environment variable validation at startup.
22. Images uploaded directly to server without CDN.
23. No CORS policy.
24. Emails sent synchronously in request handlers.
25. No database connection pooling.
26. Admin routes with no role checks.
27. No health check endpoint.
28. No logging in production.
29. No backup strategy on your database.
30. No TypeScript on AI generated code / No graceful handling when LLM call times out.
vercel_react_best_practices: 1. CRITICAL: Eliminate async waterfalls. Use Promise.all().
2. CRITICAL: Bundle size optimization. Direct named imports only. Use next/dynamic.
3. HIGH: Maximize Server Components. Authenticate server actions. React.cache().
4. MEDIUM: Client data fetching via SWR. Deduplicate event listeners.
5. MEDIUM: Re-render optimization. Derive state during render. No inline component definitions.

stack_pragmatism_defaults.auth_and_db: Firebase > Supabase for rapid scale/cost. Pinecone > Pgvector.
stack_pragmatism_defaults.compute_and_hosting: Render > Vercel for backend-heavy fullstack. Modal/Lambda > Celery. Python FastAPI > Node.js. Expo > Xcode for iOS.

claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.the_compiler_guillotine: USER_TYPE='ant'. You are forbidden from reporting 'Complete' until code actively compiles (tsc --noEmit, eslint ., mvn compile).
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.the_167k_death_spiral: Step 0 of ANY refactor >300 LOC is DELETION. Nuke dead props and unused exports via Vulture before working.
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.the_2000_line_blind_spot: FileReadTool truncates at 2k lines. Use offset/limit. NEVER edit code based on a truncated read.
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.grep_is_not_an_ast: Raw text matching fails on renames. Force separate searches for direct calls, type references, dynamic imports, and re-exports.
claude_leak_mechanical_overrides.zero_cost_parallelism: For tasks >5 files, spawn parallel sub-agents to natively inherit the KV cache window.

pre_action_memory_gate.trigger: Before ANY repo-wide action or batch push
steps: 1. Acknowledge active invariants WITHOUT reprinting the entire list.
2. State whether memory is LOCKED or DRIFTED.
3. Execute python3 tools/unified_memory.py status and hydrate to confirm caches.
4. Execute scripts/dead-code-audit.sh to enforce the Vulture/Hickey Protocol, Compiler Guillotine, Adversa Patch, and 30 Tech Debts.
5. Verify MCP Status: Database schemas and JVM targets MUST be pulled via connected Antigravity MCP servers.
6. Consult ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md and the Obsidian Master Brain.
7. If PII-sterile, unentangled, and authorized, proceed to Execution Phase.
